rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE BLANDINA D. PADLAN REVOCABLE TRUST OF 5/16/00 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate A Void Order Dated July 18, 2018
rulings.Rulings: Zenaida Graves' ("Graves") Motion to Vacate a Void Order dated July 18, 2018 is DENIED. Graves has failed to demonstrate that the order is void due to lack of notice or fraud. Graves appeared at the court hearing on July 2, 2018 and had an opportunity to object to SureTec's request that the Court grant its petition. The fact that the Court ultimately used an order which had been submitted at the Probate Examiner's request in January, 2018 - instead of the order that SureTec circulated to the parties following the July 2, 2018 hearing - has no bearing on the validity of the order. Graves has also failed to demonstrate fraud or any other ground upon which the Court could determine that the July 18, 2018 Order is void. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling must so notify the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and other parties no later than 4 p.m. on Wednesday, October 31, 2018.
